review_title: Good for quick, custom video creation. Not good for AI avatars.
description: I like its ease of use in terms of creating videos fairly quickly i.e. media, text etc. I also like its selection of stock footage (although I would prefer it if they separated video and gitfy media) and AI search functionality for suitable footage. I am very disappointed by the AI avatars and don't use them for that reason. I will subscribe to other software should I need them. They have some templates, but not a wide selection, it would be great if one could create one's own templates. Pricing is very good with 50% discount over the weekend.
author: Juliet D.
pros: I like the way you can enter a script and it is automatically split into scenes and accompanying videos will be selected based on content.
cons: The AI avatars are not very good at all. The blinking of the eyes is exceptionally unnatural and the lip movement also. One would need to make them very small if one wanted to use them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Unusable product, gibberish-filled videos, and support that straight-up ignores paying customers
description: I strongly advise against using Fliki if you care about output quality, reliability, or customer support. Every single video generated by Fliki contains gibberish or random pseudo-text artifacts embedded in the visuals (in 2026..). This is not a minor issue. It completely breaks the videos and makes them unusable for any professional or commercial purpose. We are in 2026. Modern image and video generation models solved this problem a long time ago. Random fake text in AI visuals is a known, solved issue long ago on many models, yet Fliki still produces videos that look amateurish and unprofessional. This is not an edge case. It happens on every video. I explicitly requested: Use of newer generation models only Proper functionality via API and Make.com automation Complete elimination of gibberish artifacts, which is a bare minimum expectation None of these requests were addressed. Extremely poor customer support - This is where Fliki completely fails and this is a complete disaster. I reported these issues in mid-December and followed up repeatedly: After 5 days After 8 days After more than 2 weeks After over a month The responses I received were limited to generic, copy-paste messages and automated replies claiming the issue was forwarded to the team. Promised response times of 24–72 hours were never honored. After that, communication stopped entirely. As of now, I am a paying customer who has been ignored for over a month (!). - Unusable video output - Outdated and low-quality AI results - Copyright risks - No meaningful customer support (actually no customer support, period). - Paying customers ignored for weeks This is amateur-level execution presented as a professional AI product. Do not trust this platform with your time, money, or production workflows. There are significantly better alternatives available with modern models and real customer support. Fliki is not ready for serious or professional use.
author: Ilya G.
pros: Setup was easy. The make.com modules are pretty intuitive and I only spent like an hour to get things set up.
cons: Every generated video contains gibberish / random pseudo-text in the visuals, making the output unusable Outdated image/video models that fail at problems modern AI tools solved years ago No way to reliably force newer or higher-quality models, even via API or Make.com Videos produced with copyrighted audio, creating legal and compliance risks Core product is not production-ready despite being marketed as such Lack of basic quality controls for generated visuals Automation and API workflows are unreliable and poorly supported Support provides generic, copy-paste responses instead of solutions Promised response times (24–72 hours) are not honored Paying customers can be ignored for weeks with no follow-up
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for GenAI as long as you don't need support
description: The functionality that I have tried from what is available to me in the Dashboard, as a Premium user, is good. However, their pricing page includes image generation from prompt, and a few other features, as included even in the free tier, and it is not available to me. I contacted them to ask about this and something else, using the email address they provide for support. After 18h waiting I sent them a 2nd email. Two days later, I am still waiting for a reply that would take just 5 minutes.
author: Fernando M.
pros: Their text to video generative AI functionality is quite good. It follows the prompt or url quite accurately, and makes use of relevant stock or generated media to complete the request.
cons: Their support, and the fact that their pricing page includes features for a given paid tier, which are not really available for users on that tier.

description: My overall experience with Fliki was disappointing. The system failed several times, voices skipped words, and support refused to restore credits or refund money when their system failed.

From inputting text to obtaining visually appealing images, the process is incredibly intuitive and efficient. Users can effortlessly navigate through the platform, making edits and adjustments with ease, ensuring a hassle-free experience from start to finish.

description: This is the new all-in-one platform, so it needs to be improved gradually. When it is completed, it will certainly be a great tool with many features: + Access 640+ high quality AI voices + Access 60+ languages with 90+ dialects + Advanced script editor + Multiple voices in one script (-> creating a conversation with many characters chatting) + Upload your own audio in between script + Create and host unlimited podcast shows + Create and host unlimited audiobooks + Embeddable audio player + Beautiful public pages for podcasts and audiobooks + Allows you to convert 30,000 words per month + Create videos by adding images + The Roadmap (https://fliki.ai/resources/roadmap) is continuously updated, check listed and added more suggestion from community (by sending email through support@fliki.ai). Last updated on May 21 with Voice styles feature added (chat, angry, hopeful, friendly...) Five Tacos when it is completed.
author: VDinh D.
pros: Pros + Buy one platform, you can get many tools: Text-to-speech with high quality AI voices with Voice style feature; Video creator; Podcast and Audiobooks creator with Embeddable audio player and Beautiful public pages and more. + Unlimited quantity and duration of video per month. It depends on the basic 30,000 credits you have. But you can increase your monthly credits by leaving an honest review on Appsumo, Capterra, G2 and Trustpilot. + You can suggest more features as well as improvements (through support@fliki.ai)
cons: Cons + In the present, when it still needs to be improved gradually, the price is rather high. When it is completed, the price is affordable. + With somebody, 30,000 credits (30,000 words Text-to-speech) per month is a low limit, if he doesn't leave his review on those 4 sites for getting the bonus credit limit per month. (Note: Fliki.ai only charges your credit when you use AI Text-to-speech feature. For every character, Fliki has a sample of voice speech, try to listen that sample before you choose the character, that's the way you can save your credits. With the same Scripts, how many the character that you choose to run that Script, how many time that Fliki will charge your credit). + Need more video transitions. + Subtitle needs more colour and font options. + Different voices can have different bunch of Voice styles (Ex: Jenny/Aria has many Voice styles, while Sara doesn't have Chat style in Voice styles)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best resources in creating instructional videos
description: -I am looking forward to the fact that the development team will be concentrating on the visual size of the software so that I can become a better instructional designer and concentrate on developing teaching materials that are both interesting and original.
author: Amando B.
pros: -I use this software to convert dull text files into interesting and engaging video content. Today's students pay less attention, and it can be challenging for teachers to engage them in meaningful conversation. This holds true not only for the students in my undergraduate program, but also for the adults in their later years and the broader population.-Different students utilize different strategies to master particular ideas. Some people find it more effective to learn by reading their notes aloud. They learn mostly through aural means. But people who can communicate visually and learn quickly with the help of visual aids are the ones who get the most out of this way of learning.-With the teaching materials I can make with this software, I can save a lot of time and get my students more involved in the classroom.-The capability to effortlessly generate YouTube Shorts as well as other story formats was the selling point for this program for me, as it led me to make the decision to purchase it. The workflow is among the very best when it comes to the creation of stories in particular. You won't have any trouble figuring out how to use the process, and there are many different templates from which to pick.-When you build a narrative, they provide you with a number of different audio options, which I was very glad to discover. The end product is a narrative that is simple to navigate and quick to distribute. The stories that I've written have garnered a lot of praise from m
cons: Text overlays and many other visual editing features need to be the primary emphasis of the development team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
